title: justicia volubilis
intro: Justicia volubilis, also known as the creeping shrub justicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Justicia volubilis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and possessing antimicrobial properties. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
